questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The animal kingdom is primarily classified into two groups - Vertebrata and Invertebrata.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This classification is based on the presence or absence of a backbone.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The correct classification of the animal kingdom into Vertebrata and Invertebrata is indeed based on the presence or absence of a backbone.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Chordata is a phylum of the animal kingdom.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
